fix_summary: The booking service refund-conflict predicate was corrected so unresolved refunds now block same-passenger same-flight rebooking with HTTP 409, while resolved refunds no longer block legitimate bookings. Focused regression coverage was added, and the provided automated tests passed.
approval_reasons: The implementation is tightly scoped to `BookingService._ensure_no_duplicate_or_refund_conflicts`, matching the issue localization and smallest-change constraint.
The refund-state branch is inverted in the correct direction: unresolved refund statuses raise 409, resolved statuses do not.
The added tests cover both acceptance criteria paths: pending/unresolved refund blocks rebooking, and resolved refund allows it.
Automated test results passed (`8 passed`), which is the source of truth for readiness.
